commands.review_summary:
The PR adds optional `agentId` to Gateway skill install/update schemas, routes install/update mutations through the skills workspace resolver, documents the selector, and adds focused Gateway tests.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +357, Docs +8. Total +377 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection is enough: current main always resolves install/update mutations through the default agent workspace, and the PR head’s ClawHub update path now reaches an unbound `cfg` reference. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A narrow automated repair can fix the unbound config in the ClawHub update path and refresh focused tests/proof; maintainer API/UI scope approval remains after the code repair.
